subcodes.first_line: The grace of God hath encompassed thee; thou didst attain unto the Most Holy Court and wert favored with His presence. God willing, thou must [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فضل الهی شامل حالت شد بساحت اقدس وارد شدی و بلقا فائز گشتی انشاء الله باید
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @exhortations and counsels, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment
